content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE pqtdatasource
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://laxmynicdatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/data'
)


CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT pqtformat
WITH
(
     FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

DROP EXTERNAL TABLE pqtExtTable

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE pqtExtTable
(
    [Correlationid]    VARCHAR(200),
    [Operationname]    VARCHAR(300),
    [Status]           VARCHAR(100),
    [Eventcategory]    VARCHAR(100),
    [Level]            VARCHAR(100),
    [Time]             VARCHAR(100),
    [Subscription]     VARCHAR(200),
    [Eventinitiatedby] VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resourcetype]     VARCHAR(300),
    [Resourcegroup]    VARCHAR(1000),
    [Resource]         VARCHAR(2000)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = '/folder/*.parquet',
    DATA_SOURCE = pqtdatasource,
    FILE_FORMAT = pqtformat
) 

SELECT count(*) FROM pqtExtTable
